english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Peace be with you O Master of those who prostrate before God
Peace be with you O adornment of worshippers
Peace be with you O ally of sorrows
Peace be with you (O who disfigured his forehead and knees in prostration)
Peace be with you O one accompanied by tears
Peace be with you O captive of calamities

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أعَظَمَ أَلِ العِبَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O one from The great worshippers!

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ خَامِسِ اَهْلِ الْكِسَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be with you O son of the 5th element of the people of the cloak
Peace be with you O son of the master of the martyrs
Peace be with you O support of the pious
Peace, mercy and the blessings of God be with you
